description_long: This is a modern two-seater chaise with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular seat and backrest upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The backrest and seat are both generously padded, providing comfort and support, and are seamlessly integrated without visible segmentation or tufting. The frame, armrests, and legs are constructed from dark-stained wood, giving the piece a sturdy and elegant appearance. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend horizontally from the backrest to the front, supported by the wooden frame. The legs are straight and square, positioned at the corners for stability. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or public seating spaces.
description: A modern, two-seater chaise with light gray fabric upholstery and a dark wooden frame, featuring straight armrests and legs for a clean, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and backrest, both upholstered in light gray fabric, with dark wooden armrests and legs visible on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the padding, and the straight, flat wooden armrest extending from the backrest to the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unsegmented backrest upholstered in gray fabric, with the wooden frame and legs visible at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight wooden armrest and the profile of the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, rectangular panel upholstered in smooth gray fabric, with no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements. It is moderately high and slightly angled for ergonomic support.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, made of straight, flat dark wood extending horizontally from the backrest to the front.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, square, and made of dark-stained wood, positioned at each corner for stability and a clean, modern appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
